languages.text: {n}Вас захлестывают чувства и вы, словно во сне, наблюдаете за разворачивающейся картиной.{/n}
{n}The emotions engulf you and as if in a dream you watch the scene unfolding before your eyes.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Вас захлестывают чувства и вы, словно во сне, наблюдаете за разворачивающейся картиной.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Emotions wash over you, overwhelming, and as if in a dream you watch the scene unfolding before your eyes.{/n}
{n}Emotions wash over you, overwhelming, and as if in a dream you watch the scene unfolding before your eyes.{/n}
{n}The emotions engulf you and as if in a dream you watch the scene unfolding before your eyes.{/n}
{n}The emotions engulf you and as if in a dream you watch the scene unfolding before your eyes.{/n}

languages.text: {n}情绪还是吞没了你，你仿佛置身梦境般，望着眼前的景象徐徐展开。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The emotions engulf you and as if in a dream you watch the scene unfolding before your eyes.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Duygular seni sarıyor ve sanki bir rüyadaymışçasına gözlerinin önünde gelişen sahneyi izliyorsun.{/n}

languages.text: {n}{mf|Submergé|Submergée} par ces émotions, vous regardez la scène qui se déroule sous vos yeux comme si vous étiez dans un rêve.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Las emociones te engullen y ves la escena desarrollarse ante tus ojos como si fuera un sueño.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Las emociones te engullen y ves la escena desarrollarse ante tus ojos como si fuera un sueño.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die Emotionen umfangen dich und du nimmst die Szenerie vor deinen Augen wahr, als wäre alles ein Traum.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The emotions engulf you and as if in a dream you watch the scene unfolding before your eyes.{/n}

languages.text: {n}感情があなたを包み込み、夢の中にいるかのように目の前で展開される光景を眺める。{/n}
